blast.title: Blast
blast.long: 3" radius area of effect. Roll separately for each model in area. Cover applies normally.
blast.name: Blast

brutal_blast.title: Brutal Blast
brutal_blast.long: 6" radius area of effect. Roll separately for each model in area. Cover applies normally.
brutal_blast.name: Brutal Blast

savage_blast.title: Savage Blast
savage_blast.long: 9" radius area of effect. Roll separately for each model in area. Cover applies normally.
savage_blast.name: Savage Blast

blinding.title: Blinding
blinding.long: On hit: target is Blinded until end of its next activation. While Blinded: cannot make ranged attacks, -2 dice on melee attacks, cannot use abilities requiring line of sight, move at half speed. An adjacent ally may use an action to clean ink/flash from a Blinded unit (removes Blinded status). Rain or water terrain immediately removes Blinded.
blinding.name: Blinding

grapple.title: Grapple
grapple.long: On hit, pull target 3" toward this unit. Target may not move next activation.
grapple.name: Grapple

rending.title: Rending
rending.long: If this attack exceeds Defense by 2 or more, it deals +1 additional damage.
rending.name: Rending

ignores_cover.title: Ignores Cover
ignores_cover.long: Attacks from this weapon ignore cover bonuses to Defense.
ignores_cover.name: Ignores Cover

unstable.name: Unstable
unstable.title: Unstable
unstable.long: On a Critical Failure, this weapon deals 1 damage to the attacker.

pinning_shot.title: Pinning Shot
pinning_shot.long: Target hit may not move next activation.
pinning_shot.name: Pinning Shot

quake.title: Quake
quake.long: All models within 6" must pass Quality test or become Pinned.
quake.name: Quake

rapid_fire.title: Rapid Fire
rapid_fire.long: May split attack dice between multiple targets within range. Used by Jager marksmen.
rapid_fire.name: Rapid Fire

sonic.title: Sonic
sonic.long: Ignores Heavy Armor bonus. Ignores cover bonuses to Defense. If at least 1 damage dealt, target tests Morale.
sonic.name: Sonic

shatter.title: Shatter
shatter.long: If this attack deals damage, the target suffers -1 Defense until the end of its next activation.
shatter.name: Shatter

sunder.title: Sunder
sunder.long: If this weapon deals damage, the target suffers -1 Defense for the rest of the game. This effect does not stack.
sunder.name: Sunder

filthy.title: Filthy
filthy.long: If this attack hits (even if no damage is dealt), the target rolls -1 die on its next action.
filthy.name: Filthy

melee.title: Melee
melee.long: Can be used in close combat. Does not require Line of Sight.
melee.name: Melee

breach.title: Breach
breach.long: Gain +1 Quality die when attempting Interact actions on locked or sealed objectives.
breach.name: Breach
